meta.title: Promptų Anatomija – AI Operating System
meta.description: Learn to run AI like an operating system. Prompt engineering, automation and AI agents for real business results. Promptų Anatomija – AI Operating System.

hero.subtext: Learn to run AI like an operating system. Prompt engineering, automation and AI agents for real business results.

methodology.paragraph: No more random results. We deploy engineering thinking that makes AI the most powerful member of your team.

items.title: Breakdown
items.desc: Deconstruct problems into atomic elements that AI interprets without errors.

items.title: Engineering
items.desc: Layered construction using CoT (Chain of Thought) and Few-shot engineering.

items.title: Scale
items.desc: The system integrates into business processes, saving 10–20 hours per week.

ecosystem.title: Vertical Engines
ecosystem.paragraph: Connect to purpose-built work systems ready for your market.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtext: Get access to the Promptų Anatomija training according to the number of modules you choose.

footer.tagline: We deploy an engineering AI work culture. It's not a course – it's an operating system for your business future.

success.heading: Installation complete
success.body: Payment received. Access is granted as configured. If you have questions or did not receive instructions within 24 hours – contact us.

cancel.heading: Payment cancelled
cancel.body: Your payment was not completed. You can return anytime to purchase access to the Promptų Anatomija training.
